text: Revenue growth sustainability represents a key consideration given the company's exceptional recent performance. Q4 2026-01 revenue reached $68,127,000,000, representing 19.51% year-over-year growth, following 21.96% growth in Q3 and 6.08% in Q2 [CHUNK_ID: 8673c861-f8b6-4f0f-8801-373630314eeb, CALC_ID: 0e671c19-4b44-47a7-9234-5d3634f7be27]. Net income growth showed similar patterns at 34.63% in Q4, following 20.77% in Q3 and 40.73% in Q2 [CALC_ID: 525afef8-3424-4069-a604-dd87b2bc8dfb]. The high gross margin of 75.00% and operating margin of 65.02% in Q4 suggest pricing power, but also indicate potential vulnerability to margin compression if competitive dynamics intensify or input costs rise [CALC_ID: 34f47a7f-d779-42fc-a306-dfd0f9e6fdd2, CALC_ID: 7f7d2b84-616e-4a4c-ac53-882e55fed295].
